message:
Add comprehensive ThemeProvider unit tests

Adds 21 unit tests covering ThemeProvider and useTheme:

ThemeProvider:
- Default and custom theme initialization
- Loading stored theme from localStorage
- Invalid stored theme handling
- Resolved theme for light/dark/system
- setTheme updates state and persists to localStorage
- Document class updates (light/dark)
- Transition class lifecycle (add then remove after 300ms)
- System theme change detection and response
- Children rendering

useTheme:
- Error when used outside provider
- Returns theme, resolvedTheme, setTheme
- Stable setTheme reference (memoization)

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-uqhh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
